notes: As of right now, still requires Media Foundation to progress without a Windows gamesave. z0z0z's mf-install Media Foundation fix allows the game to overcome unskippable cutscenes, but oddly cannot play the intro Unreal Engine splash screen. If you are stuck at a blank screen at the beginning, open developer console with the tilde key to skip the splash screen.
title: Breathedge

notes:
Silver because the game itself runs great, if you have an existing save - even with good performance and no audio issues.
To start a fresh game you need to use z0z0z's media foundation installer fix from here https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install (thx to the guy with the latest report), otherwise you'll get stuck on the intro, because the video can't be played. Also the splash screen does not show up, but can be skipped easily by pressing any button.
title: Breathedge

notes: The cinematic intro's don't work and have to be skipped using the command console but everything else seems to work fine
title: Breathedge

notes: After (or during) the opening cut-scene (which goes black and does not continue after playing), activate the console by pressing the ` key (on US keyboards), then type "open MAP_Space" without the quotes and then press the [enter] key to continue the game. Works very well with Steam Proton 4.11-3 on my system.
title: Breathedge

notes: All fine out of the box
title: Breathedge

notes: Still requires z0z0z's mf-install to work, but using the latest git master ZIP, with mfplay and colorcnv DLLs added, the intro Unreal Engine splash video finally plays without issue. If this were fixed with a single click, this game would be platinum. Might crash on exit.
title: Breathedge

notes: Other than Media Foundation issues, as of the latest update, this game performs worse on non-AVX2 CPUs. Identical GPU, Identical Vulkan Drivers, Identical Proton, but the difference being Ryzen 3600X vs Intel 4960X. The 4960X performs 50-60% worse due to lack of AVX2. That issue is not present on the 3600X.
title: Breathedge

notes: Playing in 4K will result in a "Rendering Thread Exception" crash after a few hours of gameplay. 1080p is currently fine, and 1440p may run into the same crash after an extended period of time.
title: Breathedge

notes: Intro now plays properly; no issues after playing over an hour in 1080p at 60fps.
